title: AppShark LLM Vulnerability Verdict
description: Structured verdict from LLM review of AppShark scan findings

rule_name.description: Name of the AppShark rule that triggered this finding

apk_path.description: Path to the scanned APK file

finding_id.description: Unique hash of the vulnerability finding from results.json

entry_method.description: Jimple signature of the analysis entry method

source.description: Source variable and location from the taint path

sink.description: Sink variable and location from the taint path

taint_path.description: Ordered list of taint propagation steps from source to sink

manifest_context.description: Manifest-level context for the affected component

sanitizer_hits.description: Which sanitizers were checked and whether they matched

verdict.description: LLM's verdict on whether this is a real vulnerability

confidence.description: Confidence score for the verdict (0.0 to 1.0)

reasoning_summary.description: Concise explanation of why the LLM reached this verdict

evidence_for.description: Evidence supporting that this is a real vulnerability

evidence_against.description: Evidence suggesting this is a false positive

required_follow_up.description: Actions needed if verdict is needs_manual_review
